preMineAllocations.label: Development Fund
preMineAllocations.note: Replace with actual address before genesis deployment.

preMineAllocations.label: Free Circulation
preMineAllocations.note: Replace with exchange/liquidity wallet address before genesis. No lock period.

dynamicPools.label: AI Ecosystem Pool
dynamicPools.supplyRule: FIXED — never exceeds 5,000,000 IXC total. No new coins are minted. Pool only decreases. Stops permanently at zero.
dynamicPools.note: NOT distributed at genesis. No wallet address. Managed exclusively by ai-layer/src/ecosystem/pool.ts. System enforces hard stop when remaining reaches 0.

miningPool.label: Proof of Work Mining Reward
miningPool.note: Not pre-mined. Distributed to miners via block rewards only.

supplyVerification.supplyControlNote: AI pool is CAPPED at 5M. No mechanism exists to create coins beyond this allocation.
